case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. JEREMY HARDCASTLE

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HARDCASTLE, JEREMY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SERVED APR-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARDCASTLE, JEREMY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HARDCASTLE, JEREMY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDCASTLE, JEREMY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SIXTH STREET, ROOM #521, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, ***ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT HAS BEEN CANCELED***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.43 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HARDCASTLE, JEREMY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HARDCASTLE, JEREMY
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
